'''鈭歵-f-sh-ch''' ('''katafshechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beblow|beblow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beblow|beblow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-f-sh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| katafshechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitafshechoko|thitafshechoko]] || [[word:jitafshechoko|jitafshechoko]] || [[word:shitafshechoko|shitafshechoko]] || [[word:kitafshechoko|kitafshechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotafshechoko|thotafshechoko]] || [[word:jotafshechoko|jotafshechoko]] || [[word:shotafshechoko|shotafshechoko]] || [[word:kotafshechoko|kotafshechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotafshechoko|thotafshechoko]] || [[word:jotafshechoko|jotafshechoko]] || [[word:shotafshechoko|shotafshechoko]] || [[word:kotafshechoko|kotafshechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tafshechoko|th忙tafshechoko]] || [[word:j忙tafshechoko|j忙tafshechoko]] || [[word:sh忙tafshechoko|sh忙tafshechoko]] || [[word:k忙tafshechoko|k忙tafshechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatafshechoko|thatafshechoko]] || [[word:jatafshechoko|jatafshechoko]] || [[word:shatafshechoko|shatafshechoko]] || [[word:katafshechoko|katafshechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafshechoko|thatafshechoko]] || [[word:jatafshechoko|jatafshechoko]] || [[word:shatafshechoko|shatafshechoko]] || [[word:katafshechoko|katafshechoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
